entity.summary: Hybrid decentralized exchange on Solana providing perpetual futures, spot trading, advanced order types, subaccounts, and public trading APIs with onchain collateral operations.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and documentation expose a live Solana trading application, perpetual futures markets, spot exchange functions, market and account APIs, websocket streams, order management, leverage controls, and deposit and withdrawal flows. Current independently maintained metrics report substantial non-zero perpetual volume together with non-zero spot volume, TVL, and open interest. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Pacifica official website and trading documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party website links the live application and documentation for perpetual trading, spot functions, advanced order types, accounts, subaccounts, deposits, withdrawals, and public REST and websocket APIs on Solana.

evidence.title: Pacifica protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report substantial non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day perpetual volume, non-zero spot DEX volume, TVL, and open interest, supporting active classification.
